column1: Particle size distributions (particles per liter per micron) for 14 major IFCB categories which make up the bulk IFCB total particle numbers at Station ALOHA averaged per cruise.

column5: columns 4-53 are particle abundances or counts (number of particles per liter per micron) for 50 log10-spaced diameter bins.

column1: Note: integrating particle counts over the 50 diameter bins yields total number of particles in per liter units per time step and taxa. Summing all counts per liter per taxa for a single time step yields total number of images imaged by the IFCB (in the 3-100 micron size range).
F1-scores quantifying accuracy of particle annotations for the different groups are provided separately.
IFCB Dashboard is available here: https://ifcbdb2.soest.hawaii.edu/datasets
